THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMIN, M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEBERT, EMIL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 SIXTH STREET #350 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO 3/29/05 AT 5:00 P.M.
